title: Champhai Zoteah AYUSH free clinic leh awareness campaign neih a ni
content:
4888/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 17th March 2026 :Vawiin khan Champhai Zote Community Hall-ah National AYUSH Mission bultumin AYUSH Free Clinic leh Awareness Campaign buatsaih a ni a, zing dar 11 atanga tlai dar 3 thleng hawn a ni.

He hunah hian Dr. Judy Vanlalhriati, Medical Officer AYUSH, District Hospital Champhai chuan AYUSH inenkawlna chungchang a zau zawka sawina leh hrilhfiahna hun a hmang a. AYUSH inenkawlna chuan rilru leh taksa hriselna a ngaih pawimawh thu te sawiin, eng natna pawh AYUSH Doctor te hnenah a in entir theih thu leh AYUSH Damdawi hi AYUSH Doctor te chawh chauh lo ei turin a chah bawk.

YOGA insawizawina neihpui hnuah a thlawna in entirna hun hman a ni a, damdawi hi a thlawna sem a ni bawk.

In entir zat - 75

Mipa - 33

Hmeichhia - 28

Hmeichhia Naupang - 14

title: NH06 siam that hna thawh mek avanga Kolasib khua leh a chhehvel a lirthei lian tlan dan tur chungchang a Kolasib SP thuchhuak
content:
4887/2025-2026

Dated Kolasib the 17th March 2026 :Kolasib SP Pu Lalrinpuia Varte chuan Mizoram State Sawrkar Notification No. B. 12021/10/2004-TRP dt. 01.06.2020 leh Section 115 of Motor Vehicle Act 1988 (Act No. 59 of 1988)-in thuneihna a pek angin lirthei lian (Heavy Motor Vehicle) chet vel dan tur thupek a chhuah.

National Highway 06 Bilkhawthlir (70 Km) atanga Kolasib (95 Km) inkar chu NHIDCL hnuaia contractor-ten chak zawka kawng siam hna an thawh theih nan dt. 19.03.2026 atanga 31.03.2026 chhung hian lirthei HMV te tlan dan tur hetiang hian ruahman a ni :

Hemi hun chhung hian a hnuaia tarlan hmunah te hian zing dar 9:00 atanga zan dar 8:00 (09:00 AM to 08:00 PM) inkarah HMV te tlan luh/tlang khap a ni ang, 08:00 PM to 09:00 AM inkarah hawn a ni thung ang :

Hmawngkhawthlir (Aizawl/Thingdawl lam atanga Kolasib khawchhung pal tlang tur tan)

Rengtekawn (Silchar/Bairabi lam atanga Kolasib khawchhung tlan tlang tur tan)

Rengtetlangsang (Silchar/Vairengte lam atanga Kolasib khawchhung tlan tlang tur tan)

He thuchhuah chungchanga harsatna neite chuan OC Kolasib PS (Ph.No. 9612194615) leh IC Traffic Cell, Kolasib (Ph. No. 8787553508 / 9862306914) ah te biak theih reng a ni a. He thupek zawm lo chu Section 179 MV Act hmanga hrem an ni ang.

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP IN LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT POLICE RUIHHLO MAN (RS.2,65,69,336 MAN) TIHCHHIATNA HUN HMANPUI
content:
4886/2025-2026Lawngtlai, the 17th March, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 3:00 pm khan Lawngtlai Police ten 2025 February atanga 2026 February thla inkara ruihhlo an man cheng Nuai 265 sing 6 sang 9 za 3, sawm thum paruk ( Rs. 2,65,69,336/-) chu vawiin khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga hovin an tichhia.

Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan ruihhlo dovin Sorkar chuan theihtawp a chhuah thu sawiin, Operation Jericho chu ṭha leh chaktakin District chhungah kalpui a ni, a ti . Tlawmngai pawl hrang hrangte nen thawhhona thatak hnuaiah ruihhlo do a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin Lawngtlai District chu ruihhlo lakah a fihlim chhoh a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

Pu PC. Lalchunglura, Superintendent of Police chuan vawiin a ruihhlo tihchhiatte hi Methamphetamine 8.127 Kgs. Opium 34.12 Kgs. leh Heroin Grams 220 a ni tih a tarlang a ni.

Lawngtlai Police ten ruihhlo an man hi District Hospital a bawlhhlawh paihna ah damdawi hmanga chiah chhiain paih a ni.

Attachment

title: SOCIAL WELFARE MINISTER HOVIN STATE ADVISORY BOARD ON DISABILITY AN THUKHAWM
content:
4885/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 17th March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Pi Lalrinpuii, Minister, Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Department kaihhruaina hnuaiah State Advisory Board on Disability meeting neih a ni.

Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan State Advisory Board member-te chu Mizoram pum aiawha rualbanlote tana kalkhawm an ni tih hre reng tura chahin, an theihtawpa an tha leh zung leh rilrute pianphung leh rilru lama chanhaite tana seng turin a fuih a. Rualbanlohna chi hrang hrang a pung zel tih sawiin, an hamthatna humhalh leh hmasawnna turte ngaihtuah zel chu Chief Minister nena an thil ngaih pawimawhte zinga lian tak a ni tih a sawi bawk a. Hemi avang hian Commissioner for Persons with Disabilities chu he thutkhawm hi buatsaih turin a hrilh a, meeting hi neih a lo ni ta a ni, a ti.

Minister chuan Commissioner for Persons with Disabilities chu dinhmun pawimawh tak a ni tih tarlangin, a hnathawh hi mipuite hriata chiang taka pholan ni ngei se a duh tih a sawi a, a mamawhtute tan Chaltlang Field Kawng, Aizawl-ah pan theih a ni tih a sawi tel bawk a ni.

Vawiin meeting-ah hian a hnuaia hmalakna tur pawimawh tak takte hi sawiho a ni :-

1. Mizorama Special School-te tihchangtlun

2. Govt. Primary School – II, Durtlang chu Special School atana ruat

3. B. Ed. In Special Education a awm theih nana hmalak

4. Rualbanlote tana tanpuina chi hrang hrangte ennawn ni se

5. Rualbanlo zirlaite tana Reader and Scribe Allowance pek dan tur

6. Rualbanlote tan bika Healthcare Scheme duan chungchang

7. Rualbanlo enkawl ngai bikte tana hamthatna

8. Government e-Office platform chu rualbanlote tana awlsam zawka hman theiha siam

9. Women & Child Development Department-in rualbanlo hnuchham naupang a enkawl mekte tana hamthatna tur hrang hrang.

State Advisory Board on Disability hi rualbanlote tana board pawimawh em em mai, an hmakhua leh hamthatna humhalh kawnga thurawn petu, consultative leh advisory board a ni a. He Board-ah hian Department hrang hrang hotute bakah rualbanlo aiawh pawlte member an ni.

Attachment

title: Mizoram Governor Interacts with Centre for Contemporary China Studies Team
content:
547/2025-2026

Aizawl, 17th March, 2026 :Mizoram Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), today interacted with the multi-disciplinary team from the Centre for Contemporary China Studies (CCCS), Ministry of External Affairs, Government of India, during their visit to the North-Eastern Region.

The Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh commended the CCCS team for their important work and stressed the importance of deeply understanding local dynamics and perspectives on the ground before arriving at policy decisions. He remarked that it is essential to know the people first to avoid potential errors in judgment. Highlighting Mizoram’s key characteristics, he described the state as primarily an agriculture-based economy currently facing a revenue deficit. He noted that the state is progressing steadily, with significant infrastructure development underway and overall advancement being pursued vigorously.

General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh described Mizoram as a well-organised society—one of the most peaceful states in India—with no major inter-tribal rivalries and strong political stability. He informed the team that, for the first time in its history, Aizawl has appeared on India’s railway map. The ongoing railway project includes plans to extend the railway line to southern Mizoram connecting with the Kaladan Multi-Modal Transit Transport Project, which is expected to significantly transform the face of Northeast India. The Governor also highlighted the Central Government’s Vibrant Villages Programme, aimed at developing villages along the international borders in Northeast India. He noted that this initiative will bring substantial improvements to border infrastructure.

The CCCS team, led by Ms Aparna Ray, Joint Secretary, CCCS & PPR, Ministry of External Affairs arrived in Mizoram on Monday for a two-day stay. During the interaction at Lok Bhavan, the team shared their observations and insights with the Governor, engaged in discussions, and addressed queries in a productive and fruitful exchange.

The Centre for Contemporary China Studies (CCCS), a think tank under India's Ministry of External Affairs, conducts research on contemporary China and provides policy inputs to government departments.

A 12-member multidisciplinary team of officers and research analysts from CCCS is currently visiting Aizawl and other parts of India's North-Eastern Region (9-18 March 2026). The visit aims to orient the team on ground realities along the Indo-Myanmar border and to understand the perspectives of local civil and security administrations.

Attachment

title: Mizoram Larsap-in Centre for Contemporary China Studies Team-te a kawm
content:
4884/2025-2026

Aizawl, the 17th March, 2026 :Mizoram Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan India hmarchhak state-te tlawha lokal Centre for Contemporary China Studies (CCCS) Multi-disciplinary Team, Ministry of External Affairs-te chu vawiin khan Lok Bhavan, Aizawlah a kawm.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan Centre for Contemporary China Studies (CCCS) te chu hna pawimawh tak thawktu an nih thu sawiin, an kal sual loh nan khawtual dinhmun leh ngaihdante zir chiang hmasa turin a chah a. Mipuite hriat chian hmasak chu thutlukna dik siam kawnga pawimawh a nih thu a sawi a. Mizoram chu agriculture-a innghat leh chhiah lakluh tlemna anih thu sawiin, state thang mek, hmasawnna ruhrel din chhoh mekna a nih thu a sawi a. Hmasawnna pawh chak taka kalpui mek a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Larsap chuan Mizoram chu khawtlang inkaihhruaina nei tha tak, India rama state ralmuang berte zinga mi, hnam bil inkara inepna lian tham awm lohna, politic ngelnghet tak awmna a ni, a ti a. Tunhnaiah Mizoram chanchina vawi khat nan Aizawl chu India railway map-ah a lan thu sawiin, Kaladan Multi-Modal Transit Project (KMMTTP) nen thlunzawmin Mizoram chhim tawp thleng rel kawng siam tum a ni a, hei hian India hmarchhak hmel hmang a thlak danglam dawn a ni, a ti a. Sawrkar laipui scheme Vibrant Villages Programme hmangin hmarchhak state ramri dep khuate tihhmasawn tum a ni a, hei hian ramriah hmasawnna a thlen dawn tih a sawi bawk.

CCCS Team hi Pi Aparna Ray, Joint Secretary, CCCS & PPR,Ministry of External Affairschuan hovin nih hnih cham turin nimin khan Mizoram an lo thleng a. Larsap hnenah hian an thil hmuh leh hriatte an hrilh a, zawhna an neihte zawtin hun hlawkthlak tak an hmang a ni.

Centre for Contemporary China Studies (CCCS), hi Ministry of External Affairs thluak bur pawimawh tak niin, China dinhmun leh hmalaknate zirchianga a tul anga Sawrkar Department hrang hrangte hnena hmalak dan tur kawhhmuha thurawn petu a ni.

CCCS hnuaia thiamna hrang hrang nei member 12 awmna Multi-disciplinary Team chuan March ni 9-18, 2026 chhungin hmarchhak state-te an tlawh kual a. Indo-Myanmar ramri depte tlawhin thil nih dante an zir chiang a, khawtual mi leh district thuneitute kawmin thil awm dan an zirchiang thin a ni.

Attachment

title: Champhaiah horticulture hmasawnna atana duan Project GREENSHIELD chungchang sawiho
content:
4885/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 17th March 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 1 khan Mizoram Transformation Programme, Champhai hnuaia ‘Sub-Committee for Implementation of Project GREENSHIELD' District Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib hovin DC Chamber-ah an thukhawm.

He hunah hian Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan member te chu project revised cost estimate a enpui a, Pi Lalrinmawii, ADHO chuan project hnathawh dan tur ‘timeline’ te sawifiahna hun a nei bawk a ni. Member lo kal khawmte chuan he project hlawhtling taka an kalpui theihna tura convergence plan-te sawikhawmin, chak zawk a hmalak zel a nih theih nan rawtna an neihte an sawiho bawk a ni.

title: CHAMPHAI DISTRICT HEADQUARTERS  LAND COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
4884/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 17th March 2026 :Vawiin chawhma dar 11 khan Champhai District Headquarters Land Committee chu Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib hovin Champhai DC Conference Hall-ah an thukhawm. He hunah hian Champhai khawpui huam chhunga House Pass, Periodic Patta, Miscellaneous Land Lease leh Land Lease dilna lut 233 te chu uluk taka ngaihtuah ho a ni.

Thutkhawm kaihruaitu Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan kalkhawmte inlawmna thu sawiin, Champhai khawpui tan hmathlir thui tak nei chunga rorel a tul tih a sawi. Champhai chu khawpui nuam a nih reng theih nan ngaituahna seng turin kalkhawmte chu a sawm a ni.

Pi Lalruatpuii Hnamte, Settlement Officer & Member Secretary, Champhai Champhai District Headquarters Land Committee chuan he hunah hian Champhai khawpui veng 19 atangin dilna 233 (House Pass , Periodic Patta , Land Lease, Miscellaneous Land Lease)a luh thu a tarlang a. Land Committee-a ngaihtuah tura chhawpchhuah ram te chu Village Council, ram diltu leh a ram ri neitute nen teh thin a ni a, hei bakah hian Revenue Department-in technical checking uluk takin an nei thin a ni, a ti a. Heng dilna hrang hrang hi committee chuan ngaihtuahin 222 chu a pawm a ni.

Vawiin Champhai District Headquarters Land Committee thutkhawmah hian Line Department hotute, Village Council, Prominent Citizen leh Political Party aiawhte an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Champhaiah World Consumer Rights Day hman a ni
content:
4883/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 17th March 2026 :Vawiin khan khawvel hmun hrang hrangin World Consumer Rights Day 2026 an hman rualin I&PR Auditorium Champhaiah pawh hman ve a ni a. He hun hi Pu R. Lalmuankima DCSO, Champhai-in a kaihruaia, Pu James Lalnithanga Addl. Deputy Commissioner Champhai-in tel puiin thusawina hun a nei.

Addl. DC Pu James Lalnithanga chuan mipuite chu consumer vek kan nih thu leh consumer kan nihna anga kan right te kan hriatchian a ngaih thu a sawi a. A bik takin Champhai District chu border area a awm a nih avangin mipuiten kan thil lei leh hralh kawngah consumer in chanvo hrang hrang kan neih te kan hriatchian zual a ngaih thu a sawi bawk a ni.

He hunah hian Resource Person atan Pu Zoliansanga Chhangte, Advocate chu ruat niin, a ni hian World Consumer Rights Day 2026 thupui “ Safe Products, Confident Consumers” tih hmangin kalkhawm te hmaah thusawina hun a nei bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: UD&PA MINISTER-IN MIZORAMA FOOTBALL STADIUM THA BER, DURTLANG FOOTBALL STADIUM A HAWNG
content:
4882/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, 17th March 2026 :Vawiin khan Aizawl Smart City Limited hmalaknaa din Durtlang Football Stadium, cheng vaibelchhe 22.3 hu chu Urban Development & Poverty Alleviation Minister Pu K. Sapdanga’n a hawng. Hawnna inkhawm hi UD&PA Secretary Pu Lalmalsawma Pachuau-in a kaihruai a, Aizawl North-1 bialtu MLA, PWD Minister ni bawk Pu Vanlalhlana; Sports & Youth Services Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar leh MLA Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua ten hun hmanpuiin, Sawrkar mi pawimawh te, MFA hruaitute leh Durtlang khawtlang hruaitu mi thahnem tak an tel bawk.

UD&PA Minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan 'he stadium saknaah hian sawrkar hmasate sulhnu chhuiin an hniakhnung kan zui a ni' tiin sawrkar kaltate a fak a; Mizorama Football khelmual tha ber hawn a ni thei ta chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, a panna kawng tur pawh ngaihtuah mek a nih thu a sawi a. Bawngkawn leh Durtlang inkarah kawng tha leh changkang tak, complete street design duan vek a nih tawh thu sawiin "sum pawhin min hmuak ran tawh a ni" a ti bawk. "Tun atanga kum 5 ah chuan mizo tlangvalte hian Delhi, Chennai, Mumbai-ah te leh National level inkhelhnaahte an pet goal fo tur a ni, chu chu kan beisei let dawn cheu a ni" tiin mizo thalaite chu he stadium hi lo hmang tangkai deuh deuh turin duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk a ni.

Sports Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Durtlang Football Stadium hawn thar chu Mizorama Football Stadium tha ber a nih thu sawiin, National Level mai ni lo, International level hialte pawh la khelh ni se tih chu an hmathlir a nih thu a sawi a. He stadium sak puitlin tak tak a nih theih nan te, football pual liau liaua serh hran a nih theih nan te leh International standard a phak theihna turtea ASCL, MFA leh contractor-te nen tanghoa hma an lak dante sawiin, khawtlang hruaitute inpekna leh thawhpuinaahte lawm thu a sawi a. Mizoram thalai tam tak ten eizawnna atana an hman mek, Football khelhna atan liau liaua stadium serhhran, Dedicated Football Stadium kan nei ta chu Mizoram tan mellung pawimawh tak a nih thu a sawi.

PWD Minister leh bialtu MLA ni bawk Pu Vanlalhlana pawhin thu sawiin, Mizorama Football Stadium tha ber, International Standard sak hlawhtlin a nih theih nana thawktute zawng hnenah lawmthu a sawi a; International Standard Stadium panna kawng a la International Standard ve rih lo chu siam ve thuai a nih tur thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian ASCL Chief Executive Officer Pu CC. Lalchhuangkima hnen atangin Technical Report ngaihthlak a ni a. Reprort-a tarlan a nih danin Durtlang Football Stadium sakna atan hian a pumpuiah ₹22,30,75,000/- sen niin, Smart City Mission, GoI atangin ₹20,07,67,500/- hmuh a ni a, Mizoram Sawrkarin ₹2,23,07,500/- a tum ve bawk a ni. A satu (contractor) atan hian M/s Biakliana & Sons te rawih an ni a. November ni 30, 2022 khan sak tan niin, March ni 9, 2026 khan sak zawh fel a ni a, vawiin hian mipui hman theih tura hawn a ni ta a ni. Field zau zawng ground area hi 110m x 68m niin FIFA Certified Artificial Grass pile height 60mm phah a ni bawk.

He Football Stadium-a thil awm chi hrang hrangte leh a dinhmun tlangpuite chu hetiang hi a ni:

1. Seating Capacity: 1257

2. Parking: 4-wheeler 50 leh 2-wheeler 90 park theihna

3. Entrance with lobby

4. Office, Reception

5. Ticket Counter and Admin Office

6. Conference Hall

7. Sports Equipment Room

8. Coach Room

9. Support Staff Room pahnih (2)

10. Team Dressing Room pali (4)

11. Players Washroom pahnih (2)

12. VIP Lounge AC and Toilet attached for Male & Female

13. Media Lounge with Toilet attached for Male & Female

14. Toilet Block (Male-2, Female-2, DA-2),

15. Match Official room

16. Medical Room

17. Electric Control Room

18. Security Cabin

19. Cafeteria

20. 2m Circulation area for spectators

Durtlang Football Stadium hi Field Management Committee, Durtlang Local Council Chairman-na hnuaia khawtlang hruaitu pawl hrang hrangte telna chuan an enkawlzui dawn a ni.

Attachment

title: Minister Prof. Lalnilawma'n Saitual CMO office hnenah Multipurpose Utility Vehicle a hlan
content:
4881/2025-2026

Saitual the 17th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Mission Foundation Movement bul tumin CMO office, Saitualah CMO Office hnenah Multipurpose Utility Vehicle chu Indian Oil Corporation CSR Program hnuaiah inhlanna hun hman a ni a. Inkhawm hi Saitual Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan kaihruaiin, Prof. Lalnilawma, Minister of State, Bialtu MLA ni bawk chu khuallian a ni.

Inkhawm kaihruaitu Saitual bawrhsap Pu Srinivasa Sadi chuan Saitual District ina a mamawh em em mai an inhlan thei tur chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, thingtlang kilkhawr zawk te thleng a, nunna chhanna atana tangkai tak a nih ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

Pu Lalramchuanzela, Executive Director, Mission Foundation Movement chua report pein, Saitual District atana Health sector a hman turin IOC hnenah hian Project thehlutin IOC hian motor 2 an rawn pek thu sawiin hmun harsa leh kilkhawr zawkah Health check up neih nan te, immunisation leh vaccine sem nan ten an hman tur thu a sawi.

IOC, Sr. Manager chuan NGO rintlak leh record tha tak MFM kaltlang a, tanpuina an pe thei chu lawmthu sawiin Mizoram hmun hrang hrangah a bikin hriselna lam (health sector) lamah nasa taka an luan chhuah tawh thu a sawi a, Project hi dil an tam viau laiin mi tlem te rintlak tak te hnenah kan pe thin a. Mihring kan nih chhung chuan hriselna hi a pawimawh em em a, hriselna tha nei tur chuan, a hun taka inenkawl theih te leh in enkawlna tur dawn theih hi a pawimawh hle a, chu mi sut kianna tur atan he Multipurpose Utility Vehicle hi an hman ngei theih nan duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Khuallian chuan CSIR fund behchhan in Company lian tam tak hneah Project hi Mission Foundation Movement te nen theih tawpin an dil a, vawi tam tak an hlawhchham tawh hnu ah IOC in an dilna te an tih hlawhtling sak thei hi lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Saitual mipui tan chauh ni lovin, Saitual District pumpui tan tangkai tak a hman a nih theih ngei a beisei thu a sawi a ni, MFM lam pawhin theih tawp chhuahpui zel turin a sawm a ni.

Dr. Zothanpari Chhakchhuak, Dy. Chief Medical Officer, Saitual District lawmthu sawinain hun a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: Supply Minister-in ICFAI University-ah World Social Work Day, 2026 hmanpui.
content:
4880/2025-2026

Aizawl, 17th March, 2026 :Vawiin March ni 17 hi World Social Work Day, 2026 a ni a, he ni denchhena hun buatsaih chu FCS&CA Minister Pu B.Lalchhanzova'n ICFAI Universityah a hmanpui.

Kumin Social Work Day thupui chu "Co- Building Hope and Harmony: Harambee call to unite a divided society" tih a ni a. He hunah hian Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan thu sawiin social work hi kawng hmang nei taka midangte puihna "Technical & Profesional Helping Discipline" a ni a, khawtlanga thil tha chin than awmte phun ngheh a, midangte zirtir bakah khawtlang that tawk lohna siam tha a, a tul anga repair theihna thiamna kengtel a ni a ti a, social work chuan puih ngaite hrechiang hmasain leh inkungkaihna tha tak siam hmasain midangte anmahni leh anmahni intanpui thei turin a thawhpui thin a ni a ti.

Pu B.Lalchhanzova chuan Social work zirlaite chu an thiamnate kan khawtlang leh ram tan tangkai taka hmang tura intuaihriam zel turin a chah bawk a. Ama chanchin tarlangin thingtlang tlangval, hmalam pan duh vanga chhungte bela khawpuia bul tan ve mai pawhin Pathian zarah leh a tum ruh vanga tun dinhmun a thlen theih chuan ICFAI University a zir phakte chuan an tum phawt chuan hlawhtlinna sang tak an chang thei ngei ngei ang tiin zirlai kalkhawm te chu a fuih.

Pu B. Chhanzova chuan ICFAI a Social Work zirlai te chu a NGO enkawl Cod Nercah engemawzat an lo zirtir ve tawh thu leh Master Degree zo thei tura hlen chhuah ngei ngai block placement an lo pek tawh thin thu sawiin, an zinga a tel thei chu lawmawm a tih takzet thu a sawi a ni.

Attachment

title: SERCHHIPAH SHAKSHAM ANGANWADI & POSHAN 2.0 HNUAIAH DISTRICT CONVERGENCE MEETING NEIH A NI
content:
4879/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 17th March, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 10:00AM khan Shaksham Anganwadi & Poshan 2.0 hnuaiah Serchhip Bawrhsap Pu Paul L Khuma hovin DC Meeting Hall ah District Convergence Meeting neih a ni.

District Convergence Committee Chairman leh Bawrhsap ni bawk Pu Paul L Khuma chuan sawrkar department hrang hrangte thawhhona hian sawrkar leh mipuite tan thil tha a chhuak thin tih sawiin officer kal khawmte chu thawhhona tha tak nei zel turin a fuih a. Tum thuhmun nei ten tang tlanga hna kan thawh hian sawt zawk leh awm ze nei zawkin hna a thawh theih a ni, a ti.

Meeting hmasa ni 29.01.2026-a neih tawh a thurelte bawhzui a nih dan report ngaihthlak a ni a. Pi Lalthlamuani Rokhum, District Programme Officer, Women & Child Development Department leh Member Secretary ni bawk chuan agenda sawihawnna neiin line department te hmalak dan hrang hrang ngaihthlak a ni bawk.

District Programme Officer (DPO) office tur hmun chungchang sawiho niin Additional DC kaihhruaina hnuaiah a hmuhhma tur P&E Veng lamah en a ni tawh a. DLC meeting ah thlen leh tura dah a ni. Leisang Venga Anganwadi Centre chu a hmun sawn dilna a luh avangin meeting hmasaah sawiho a lo ni tawh a. AOC Veng lam en niin hei pawh hi la rel leh tura dah a ni bawk.

District Urban Development Office hmalaknain Angnwadi Centre sawm tan bawlhhlawh bawm leisak an ni a. Hei hi hun remchang hmasa berah sem ni se, an ti a. Kut sil dan dik inzirtir chungchang pawh DUDO te nena thawkhoin hmalak a ni dawn bawk a ni.

Chairman Pu Paul L Khuma lawmthu sawina in hun a khar a. Thawhhona tha tak nen an thurel bawhzuina kawngah a hmawrbawkna tha tak leh hlawhtling tak an neih theihnan theihtawpa bawhzui turin kalkhawm te a sawm a ni.

title: Petrol leh Diesel hralh chungchanga Serchhip DC thupek
content:
4878/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 17th March, 2026 :Tunlai hian Serchhip District chhungah mi thenkhat ten kan thenawm ram Myanmar lama hralh chhawn leh turin kan District chhung Filling Station thenkhatah Tuialhthei a hlawmin an la thin tih hriat a ni a. hei hian mipuite tan harsatna lian tak a thlenin, kan District chhungah Petrol leh Diesel indaihlohna a awm phah fo thin tih hriaiin, Petrol leh Diesel hralh leh lei chungchangah District Magistrate Pu Paul L Khuma chuan Section 163 of Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023-in thuneihna a pek angin a hnuaia thupek hi a tichhuak:

1. Serchhip District chhunga Filling Station ten Sawrkar in man(rate) a bithliah aia sangin(Black Marketing) Petrol leh Diesel an hralh tur a ni lo.

2 . Serchhip District chhunga Filling Station zawng zawng ten Petrol 500litre leh Diesel 1000litre chin chunglam chu phalna neia dahthatna (Storage permit) nei te hnenah chauh an hralh chhuak tur a ni.

3.Petrol leh Diesel sumdawnna kaihhnawih thilah kan thenawm ram Myanmar leh ram dangah dan lova hralh emaw pek chhawn khap tlat a ni.

He thupek hian thu leh awm hma chu Order chhuah March 17, 2026 atanga thla 2(two months) chhung a huam ang.

He thupek zawm lo chu Section 223 of Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023 dan hmangin hrem theih an ni ang.

title: Eirawngbawlna Gas renchem chungchanga Supply Department thuchhuah
content:
4877/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 17th March, 2026 :Tun lai khawvel geo politics boruak avangin mipuiten eirawngbawlna gas-ah harsatna an tawh loh nan India Sawrkar chuan theihtawpin hma a la reng a, State Sawrkar pawhin mipuiten harsatna an tawh loh nan chak takin hma a la reng bawk a ni.

Tun dinhmunah nitina Mizoram mipuite mamawh zat LPG chu bur 7,900 vel a ni a. LPG Distributor hrang hrangah harsatna lian tham awm lovin LPG a thleng mek zel a. Tin, Mizoramin LPG kan lak luhna, IOCL Bottling Plant, Borkhola ah pawh harsatna awm lovin kan State mamawh ang tawk lak zel a la ni.

India sawrkarin mipuiten tul lova LPG bur an chhekkhawl loh nan LPG booking tih hnuhnun ber atanga booking tih leh theih hun inkar chu ni 25-ah a rawn bituk thar bawk a.

Hetiang boruak kaihhnawihah hian mi duham thenkhatin tul lova LPG bur an chhekkhawl leh, man to zawka dan lova an hralh chhawn loh nana hma la turin dated 17.03.2026 hian Sawrkarin State Level leh District Level Monitoring Cell a din thar a. He Cell hian mipuiten an chanvo dik tak leh a mamawh tak tak ten LPG bur an dawn theih nan hma a la dawn a ni.

Hetianga chak taka State Sawrkarin hma a lak avang hian mipuite chiai lo tur leh, tul lova LPG chhekkhawl lo turin Sawrkar-in mipui te a ngen tak meuh meuh a, LPG pawh renchem taka hmang turin mipui te a ngen bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: AGRICULTURE MINISTER-IN TRACTOR 25 LEH HMANRAW DANGTE A VAILIAM
content:
4876/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 17th March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Pu P.C. Vanlalruata, Minister, Agriculture & Farmers' Welfare Department, etc. chuan Zonun Enterprise, Silaimual, Melthum atangin Group of Farmers leh mimal 6 (paruk)-te hman turin Custom Hiring Centre hnuai atangin Tractor 25 leh hmanraw chi hrang hrang a vailiam.

Tractor vailiamna huna khuallian Minister Pu P.C. Vanlalruata chuan sawrkarin leilehna hmanraw tam zawk loneitute'n an neih theih nan a theih angin hma a la zel tih sawiin, kumin Annual Action Plan-ah pawh Farm Mechanization atan sum tam zawk a ruahman a ni, a ti a. Buhhum lei chungchangah harsatna a awm avangin buhhum lei tawh lova Mizoram chhunga buhfai thar lei a nih theih nan, sawrkarin policy mumal tak nei turin hmalakna chak takin a kalpui mek a ni, tih a sawi bawk.

Minister chuan oilseed tam zawk tharchhuah a nih theih nan leilet neitute pawh nasa zawka hma la a, sawrkar laipuiin ruahmanna a siamte hmang tangkai turin a fuih a. Khawl leh hmanraw dang an dawnte chu duat tak leh uluk taka enkawl a, tangkai taka hmang turin a chah bawk a ni.

Kumin hian Tractor leh leilehna hmanrua 61 (sawmruk pakhat) sem tura ruahman niin, he'ngte hi Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization (SMAM) scheme hnuaia sum hmuh atanga pekchhuah tur a ni a. CHC pakhat zelah khawl leh hmanraw leina turin sawrkarin 95% (hei hi cheng nuai 14.25) vel thleng a tumsak thin a. 5% chu loneitute (Group of Farmers) tum ve tur a ni a. An tractor lak duh azirin sawrkarin tractor man atana a sum sen hi a danglam thin bawk.

Company hrang hrang 4 (pali) siamchhuah tractor-te pechhuak tur hian Sorkar chuan approved dealer 4 (pali) a nei a. Tractor leh a hmanrua dawng tura thlanchhuah farmer intelkhawm, Group of Farmers-te hian approved dealer-te atangin an tractor duh ber an thlang mai thin a ni.

Attachment

title: Tualteah Jal Arpan Diwas hman a ni
content:
4875/2025-2026

Khawzawl, dated 17th March 2026 :Vawiin khan Tualte khua chuan an khaw tui lak lawmna leh inhlanna (Handing Over) Jal Arpan Diwas hman a ni. Pu Lalchhanchhuaha VCP & WATSAN Chairman in kaihruaiin, Pi Lallawmzuali, District Agriculture Officer (DAO) leh DWSM Member ni bawk chu Khuallian a ni.

He hunah hian Er. Freddy Vanlalmuanawma SDO, PHED Chuan Technical report pe in, Tualte ah hian NABARD RIDF hnuaia Solar Pumping hna thawh a ni a, Bunglui leh Kawrmang tui te pump niin 500 metre a sang chu stage 2 a pump chhuah a ni. JJM hnuaiah Tualte khua hian tui connection a thlawnin 221 pek a ni a, Tualte khua hi Har Ghar Jal Village a puan tawh a ni. Financial year 2025-2026 atan Jal Seva Ankalaan Assessment lak tawh niin, Jal Seeva Ankalaan Citizen Feedback pawh mi engemaw zatin an ti tawh bawk.

Khuallian Pi Lallawmzuali chuan thu sawiin hmasawnna hnathawh a nih hian ram alo chereu a, tuihna alo kangchat a, sik leh sa a inthlak ta thin tih a sawi a. Mihring te innghahna lian ber chu Agriculture a ni a, India ram mipui 70% aia tam te ei bar zawnna chu agriculture a ni tih sawiin tui hi a pawimawh em em a, tui tello in thlai a thar theih loh tih a sawi a. Ramngaw kan thiah hian a let 28 in lei hanna a ti tla hniam a, a let 17 in leilung a luangral chak zawk a ni tih a sawi a. Mizoram a kumtin ram ngaw thiat a, tlangram lo neih hian tuihna a ti kangchat rang em em a ni tih sawiin India Sorkar leh state sorkar pawhin tui a ngaih pawimawh vangin he thil hlu tak hi khawtlangin lo vawng tha turin a chah a ni.

Chairman kaihhruainain kalkhawm ten tui hna humhalh leh Tui lak enkawl chungchang thutiam an la a, Pu C. Malsawmdawngkima, Secretary, WATSAN Committee Tualte, chuan lawmthu sawina a nei bawk.

Attachment

title: Safe Products, Confident Consumers' tih Thupui Hmangin Hnahthial District-ah World Consumer Rights Day hman a ni
content:
4874/2025-2026

Dated Hnahthial, the 17th March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Horeb Conference Hall-ah Hnahthial District Civil Supplies Office bultumin World Consumer Rights Day hman a ni a. Pu HD Lalpekmawia, Project Director, DRDO Hnahthial chu khuallian ni a hmanpuiin Dr. Michael Solo, District Civil Supplies Officer kaihhruaina hnuaiah he hun hi hman a ni. Thupuiah 'Safe Products, Confident Consumers' tih hman a ni.

Pu HD Lalpekmawia Project Director DRDO chuan Consumer Rights chu US President hmingthang tak John F. Kennedy hun lai kum 1962 atanga lo hman tan tawh a nih thu sawiin mtin mai chu engemaw ti kawng zawng takin Consumer kan nih vek thu a sawi a. Kan dikna chanvo leh tihtur te kan hriat a tul tih sawiin sumdawng thenkhat ten an mahni dawrtute an ngaihtuah tawk lo thin leh diklo taka sum an eisak thin chu mihring dikna chanvo in rahbehsakna pakhat a nih thu a sawi. Thil kan lei emaw kan dawr dawn hian Consumer-te chuan duhthlantheihna kan nei a ni ti hre turin mipuite a duh thu sawiin chung ti theilo khawpa a zuartuten an khap leh an phalloh thin hi Consumer Rights dan bawhchhiatna a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Khuallian chuan sumdawngte chu mipui tana thil him tawk lo zawrh chhuah kawngah pawh mawh nasa taka an phurh thu a sawi a. Mipui mamawhna leh indaihlohna denchhena thil man tih tho chu Consumer Rights dan bawhchhiatna niin an dikna chanvo te hria a huaisen taka dikna vawng nung zel turin kal khawmte a chah nghal a ni.

Hnahthial District Consumer's Union President Pu P. Vanlaltluanga pawh in thu sawiin Consumer leh Consumer Union te hnathawh leh mawhphurhna te a sawifiah a. Consumer Union-te chu lawmman pawh nei lova Consumer tupawh an dikna chanvo hmu lova awm te tanpui chu an hnapui ber a nih thu sawiin Consumer Union chu pawl lian tak, Parliament pawh in a hriatpui thlap a nih thu a sawi a. Pawl anga an hmalakna te mipui ten lo thlawp a, tih tur a sawi ang te tha tak a lo zawm zel turin a sawm nghal bawk a ni.

Pu K. Lalhunmawia, Secretary, HDCU chu Resource Person niin World Consumer Rights Day 2026 thupui 'Safe Products, Confident Consumers ' sawifiahna hun a hmang a. Pu Zoramdinthar chuan lawmthu sawiin hun hi a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: SIAHA DISTRICT THOSAI (THINGSEN) KHUAAH JAL ARPAN DIWAS LEH LOK JAL UTSAV HMAN A NI
content:
4873/2025-2026

Dated Siaha, the 17 March, 2026 :Tukin zing dar 7:00A.M. khan Siaha district Thosai (Thingsen) khuaah Har Ghar Jal, Jal Jeevan Mission hnuaiah JAL MAHOTSAV denchhenin Jal Arpan Diwas leh Lok Jal Utsav hman a ni a, Er. Viasai Solo, Sr. EE, PHED Siaha district chuan khuallian niin hun a hmanpui.

He programme in a tum ber chu mipui ten tui lakna hmanrua, khawl leh zêm (tank) te neitu nihna rilru an put a, dimdawi taka enkawl dan an thiam theihna tura zirtir bakah tuihna humhalh leh siam thar kawngah ṭan an lak dan tur kawhhmuh leh a enkawl chhunzawm zel chu an kova tla a ni tih inhrilhhriatna hun a ni.

Vawiin hun hmanah hian Pu Pradeep Gurung, J.E, PHED chuan technical report a pek rualin khawtlang hruaitute hnenah document hlanna hun a nei a, Meri Panchayat apps hman dan a zirtir bawk. Ministry of Jal Shakti, Government of India thu chhuak anga Public Health Engineering Department, Saiha WATSAN Division buatsaih hun hman Er. Lalmuanpuia, SDO, PHED in kaihruai a, Tui humhalhna thu chham rual (Pledge) zawhah hun hman tihtawp a ni.

title: SIAHA-AH INTERNATIONAL WOMEN'S DAY 2026 HMAN A NI
content:
4872/2025-2026

Dated Siaha, the 17 March, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:30AM khân MADC Golden Jubilee Hall, Council Vaih, Siahaah International Women's Day lawmna hun hman a ni a, Siaha khawpui chhunga MCHP General Headquarters aiawh, MHIP aiawh, LWA leh MSO Headquarters aiawh bakah Anganwadi Worker-te an tel.

Pi Hepaw Hlychho, CDPO, Siaha chuan inlawmna thu sawiin, Hmeichhiate ni hi March ni 8 a ni a, Sunday anih avangin remchan zawkna avangin vawiinah hun hman a ni, a ti. Kumin thupui chu 'Rights, Justice, Action for all womens and girls anih thu leh International Women's day pual hian 'Pêkin Lukhawng a nei' (give to Gain) tih kalpui niin mi inphalte thehkhawm thuamhnaw, naupang läwm (toys) leh lehkhabu chu Grace baby home, College vaih, Siaha leh District Hospital, Siaha naupang ward-ah pek a nih thu CDPO hian a sawi.

Pi LS Lalbiakzuali, DSWO Siaha chuan Hmeichhiate dinhmun chawikan a nih theih nâna International Women's Day hman a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, 'Chhungkua, kohhran, khawtlâng tifamkimtu chu hmeichhiate hi kan ni a, indah hniam tur kan ni lo. Mipa aiin hmeichhiate hian mi dang khawngaih theihna te, an dinhmuna inchan thiamna leh hriatthiamna kan ngah bîk, a ti. Mahni dikna chanvo hretu ni ringawt lo va, tih tur leh tih loh tur hretu ni tûrin kal khawmte chu a chah a, mahni chhungkua aia dah pawimawh nei lo ila kan tifuh fo a ti bawk. Anganwadi Worker te hnathawh sawrkarin an hriatpui thu DSWO chuan sawiin, 'Anganwadi Centre-a thawktute kal tlânga hnathawh tur inpek hian an ti ṭha ṭhin a, mi dangte kova dah aiin an rintlak zawk a ni' a ti.

Pi Lynn H. Ngohei, Secretary, KHP Hqrs, ECM, DCPO aiawh, OSC leh Shakti Sadan thawktute aṭangin thusawi ngaithlak a ni a, International Women's Day pual hian 'Empowering women, Empowering Society' tih thupui hmangin school naupangte tan essay inziahsiak a ni a, lawmman dawngtute chu:-

1. Zipor M. Marapawngia.

2. Florence B. Byhnazi.

3. Beithathipa

4. Zorammawii (Consolation)

5. Sabina V. Khaingiarili (Consolation)

District Hub for Empowerment of Women (DHEW), Women & Child Development, Siaha buatsaih vawiin hun hman hi Pu Kennedy H. Vanlalchunga, Accountant, DHEW in a kaihruai a, Pi B. Zisia, District Mission Coordinator, DHEW-in lawmthu sawina a nei a, hun hman tih tawp a ni.

Attachment

title: UD&PA Minister-in bawlhhlawh paih motor vai liam
content:
4871/2025-2026

Aizawl 17th March, 2026 :Vawiin chhun dar khan Open Gym, MINECO ah Urban Development & Poverty Alleviation Minister Pu K. Sapdanga'n Swachh Bharat Kosh (SBK) Trust kaltlanga lei bawlhlawh paih motor 12 a vai liam.

He hunah hian Minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan thu sawiin Swachh Bharat Kosh (SBK) Trust chu sawrkar laipuiin kum 2014-ah a din tih tarlangin, Swachh Bharat Mission hlawhtlinna tura duan a ni a ti a, he Trust hi company lian leh bank ten Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) kaltlang leh mimal thahnem ngai ten faina leh thianghlimna kawng a sum an rawn thawh ve theihna tura tura duan a nih thu a sawi a ni.

Minister chuan Swachh Bharat Kosh Trust hnuaia sum hmuhte hi faina leh thianghlimna kawnga hmasawnna atan te, bawlhhlawh sawngbawlna hmun mumal leh tha zawk siam nan te, vantlang inthiarna sak nan te, Awareness Campaign bakah faina lama hna thawktute thiamna tih punna tura training leh workshop neih nan te hman thin a nih thu a sawi a.

Swachh Bharat Kosh Trust hian Swachh Bharat Mission hmalakna hi sawrkar tihhlawhtlin tur bik a ni mai lova, mitin mawhphurhna a nih zawk zia a tarlang a ni a ti a. Faina leh thianghlimna kawnga thawk chhuak kher lo tan pawh a sum fai ang zawnga an chet chhuah ve theihna niin, heng thawhhona avang hian India ram pawhin Faina leh thianghlimna piahlamah, bawlhhlawh sawngbawlna thlengin hma a sawn nasa hle tih a sawi bawk.

Swachh Bharat Kosh Trust hnuaiah hian Rs. 1.68 crore (Cheng Nuai za sawmrukpariat) dawn a ni a, hemi hmang hian bawlhhlawh phur lirthei 12 lei niin - Farkawn, Kawrthah, Ngopa, Phullen, W. Phaileng, Saitual, Mamit, Khawzawl, Hnahthial, Lengpui, N.Vanlaiphai leh SSO Office, Aizawl te pek an ni a, registration tih fel sa vek niin document pawimawhte pawh hlan nghal an ni a, heng truck-ah hian PA set (aurinna) leh GPS Tracker dah vek a ni.

Heng Garbage Truck bakah hian a chunga tarlan khaw 12 a Sanitation Workers te hman turin Rain Coat - 2, Gloves (kutkawr) - pair 14, Mask – 12, Gumboot - pair 4, hunter boot - pair 2, kekawr - 6, Cap (lukhum) - 2, T-shirt - 4 leh kawrlum - 2 theuh pek an ni bawk.

Swachh Bharat Kosh hnuaia bawlhhlawh paih motor vailiam puala inkhawm hi Pu CC Lalchhuangkima, Addl. Secretary, UD&PA Department & Chief Executive Officer, Aizawl Smart City Ltd.  chuan a kaihruai a. Pu Jacob Lalawmpuia, Director, UD&PA Department chuan Report a pe a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP KAIHHRUAINA HNUAI AH REGULATION OF ESSENTIAL COMMODITIES (POL & LPG) LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT, CHUNGCHAN AH THUTKHAWM NEIH A NI
content:
4870/2025-2026Lawngtlai, the 17th March, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 1:00PM khan DC's Office Chamber, Lawngtlai ah Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruainna in Regulation of Essential Commodities (POL & LPG) chungchangah thutkhawmna neih a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan member kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. West - Asia buaina vangin tun dinhmun ah Lawngtlai District ah Oil leh Gas ah harsatna a awm lova,mipui tan chiâina tur a awm lo a ni a ti a.Thuneitu sang zawk atanga engemaw thulh ah lo invenlawk dan tur ruahman tura tih an nih thu sawiin, mipui chiai-na tur nilovin, mipui hmakhua sut enna tur zawk a ni a ti. Oil leh gas- ah hnianghnar tura District Administration - in theihtawp a chhuah reng thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian DCSO, Lawngtlai hnen atang leh Filling Station leh Gas Agent report atangin Oil leh Gas dinhmun a tha a, nidang an phaklohna a awmloh thu ngaihthlak a ni. Petrol leh Diesel bik ah Filling Station ten Litres 8000 an neih chin ah a hlawm a hralh leh bur a dawh remtilo se, Litres 5000 an neih chin ah DCSO atanga Permit hmanga pekchhuah nise an ti a, Filling Station te dinhmun chu DCSO leh Police inkawp ten karkhat ah vawi hnih (Thawhtan ni leh Ninga Ni) ah enfiah thin se tih a ni.

Eirawngbawlna Gas bik ah Agent lam chuan Gas chu a ruka hralh theih a nihloh thu sawiin, system tha tak kalpui nih vangin Card neilo tan laktheih a nilo an ti a, tunhnai ah Gas lak theihdan tihdanglam a nih thu sawiin, Khawpui huamchhung ah Gas an lak atanga Ni 25 a ral loh chuan laktheih a ni lova, Thingtlang ah Ni 45 chhung a tlak a ngaih thu sawilan a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawm chuan Joint Control Room ruahman tha a ti a, Deputy Commissioner, Superintendent of Police, DCSO leh DIPRO ten an vil ang a, mipui hriat tur pawimawh te DIPRO in puangzar leh chhuah zel nise tih a ni bawk.

Vawiin Meeting ah hian LADC leh CADC aiawh, S.P, 3rd IR Battalion Commandant, Filling Station leh Gas Agent aiawh bak ah President Central YLA, President VC Association leh MJA Lawngtlai hruaitute an tel a ni.

title: Lungleiah World Consumer Rights Day 2026 pualin hun hman a ni
content:
4869/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla 17 :Vawiin khan Lunglei DC Conference Hall-ah "Safe Product, Confident Consumers" tih thupuia hmangin World Consumer Rights Day 2026 pualin hun hman a ni a. Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chu Khuallian a ni.

Khuallian Pi Navneet Mann chuan dawrkaite thil zawrh reng reng chu consumer-te tana rin tlak a ni tur a nih thu sawiin, thil chhia leh thi tawh (expire) lei loh tur a ni a, a zuartute pawhin an zuar tur a ni lo, a ti a. Thil siamtute leh zuartute chuan rin tlak ngei an zuar tur a ni tiin, hemi kawngah hian mi tin inzirtir a ṭul thu a sawi a. Tun laiin eirawng bawlna gas LPG a harsa dawn tih thuthang a tam hle tih sawiin, hei hi thu dik lo a ni tih Lunglei mipuite'n an hriat a ṭul thu leh Media te chu thu dik theh darh tura a beisei thu a sawi a. Mipuite chu chi-ai lo tura chahin, hei hi remchanga la a, a man to (black)-a gas zuar lo turin mi tinte a ngen.

Lunglei District Consumer Association Pu JL Hmingthanga'n hun a kaihruai a. Keynote Address sawitu, LDCA President Prof. Lalchhanhima Fanchun chuan dawrkai leh sumdawng (service provider)-te chu dan hnuaiah dik taka an sumdawn a ṭul thu sawiin, consumer-te'n thuneitute hnenah an vuivaina thu an thlen ṭhin a pawimawh thu leh Lungleia Consumer Court awm chu consumer-te'n chhawr ṭangkai se a duh thu a sawi.

Resource Person, Lunglei Government College-a Associate Professor Pu R. Lalrochama chuan, "Safe Product, Confident Consumers" tih thupui hmangin thu a sawi a. Thil siam chhuaktute chuan mipui hnena an insawi leh infak ang ngeiin thil an siam chhuak tur a nih bakah, consumer-te tana him ngei an pe chhuak tur a ni tiin, an product a ṭha tih finfiahna (certification) ISI Mark chuang ngei a ni tur a ni, a ti a. Consumer rights humhim kawnga hma lakna chu mi tinin a huhova thawh tur mamawhphurhna inṭawm a nih thu sawiin, consumer-te'n kan dikna leh chanvo ngaihtuah chungin consumer rights bawhchhiatna do leh khap beh a ṭul tih a sawi.

Vawiina hun hmanah hian sawrkar official-te, LDCA member-te, Government J. Buana College leh Lunglei Government College zirlaite an tel a. Zawhna leh chhanna leh sawi hona hun hman niin, zawhnate chu mipui mamawh petu sawrkar department hrang hrang leh mimal sumdawngte'n an chhang a ni.

Attachment

title: HULHLIAP SHORT STAY AFTER CARE SKILL DEVELOPMENT TRAINING BATCH 4-NA TAN A NI
content:
4868/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 17th March, 2026 :Vawiin khan MFM Skill Training Centre, Dawrpui Vengtharah Hulhliap Short Stay Centre chhuakte tan a thlawna Skill Training buatsaih - Assistant Electrician batch 4-na leh Plumbing batch hmasa ber chu tan a ni a. Tun tumah hian Hulhliap SSC chhuak mi 18 in Assistant Electrician leh mi 20 in Plumbing an zir dawn a ni.

Pi Vanlalhruaii, Member Secretary, Task Group on Aftercare, Skill Training & Handholding, Hulhliap-SSC chuan inkhawm a kaihruai a, Upa Dr. R. Vanlalzauva, Director, Mission Foundation Movement (MFM) in hunserh hmangin, fuihna thu a sawi.

Rev. J.C Lalramliana, Director, Revival Department Mizoram Synod & Member, Task Group on Aftercare, Skill Training & Handholding, Hulhliap-SSC chuan thusawina hun neiin, Pi Vanlalhruaii chuan inkhawm kharna hun a hmang a. Tun thleng hian Hulhliap chhuak mi 118 an awm tawh a ni.

Attachment

title: LESDE MINISTER PU LALNGHINGLOVA HMAR IN MIZORAM MISTIRI ASSOCIATION GENERAL ASSEMBLY HMANPUI
content:
4867/2025-2026Aizawl, the 17th of March, 2026 :Vawiin chawhma dar 10:00 khan Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Minister of State, Labour, Employment, Skill Development & Emtrepreneurship Department chuan Mizoram Mistiri Association (MMA) General Assembly vawi 11-na chu Synod Conference Centre, Mission Veng-ah a hmanpui a, MMA Dan Bu 2026 a tlangzarh.

LESDE Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan, "Mistiri te hi chhungkaw tana eizawngtu, chhungkaw chawm tura hnathawk tak takte kan ni a. Eizawnna hrang hrang awmte zingah hian hna zahawm tak a ni." a ti a. "Mizoram Mistiri Association hi Mizo hnam dam khawchhuahnan a hlu a, hnamdang mistiri ten hnathawkin min rawn luhchilh a, chutah chuan keini in kan kut thiamna hmangin tan kan lo khawh a pawimawh a, kan hnam tan thahnem kan ngaih a pawimawh hle." tiin a sawi.

LESDE minister Pu Tetea Hmar hian Mizoram Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (MBOCWWB) chungchang sawi bawkin, "Welfare Board te hi kut hnathawktute ta a ni a, a hamthatna awm theite pawh tihpun a ni bawk. MBOCWWB chungchang hi mi tinin an hriat kan duh a. Kut hnathawktute zawng zawngin he hamthatna awm te hi dawng thei se kan duh a ni. MMA member-te pawh hi keimahni bakah kan hnuaia thawkte thlengin inziaklut vek ang u." tiin a sawm bawk a. Minister hian MMA member-te chu an theihna chinah tunlai khawvel thiamna mila inzir ve zel a, hman thiam ve zel tum turin a fuih bawk a ni.

Mizoram Mistiri Association-ah hian tun dinhmunah member 3000 vel an awm mek a. Mizoram chhungah Branch 115 inziaklut awm tawhin, kumin atan hian Branch 50 velin zawm thar turin hma an la bawk. MMA General Assembly vawi 11-naah hian kum 2026-2028 chhunga General Headquarters hruaitu turte thlan a ni nghal a. Chungte chu:

President - Pu Rochharliana Khiangte, Bethlehem Veng

Vice President - Pu Vanlalhriata, Zuangtui

General Secretary - Pu CD. Lalthlamuana, Bethlehem Veng

Asst. Secretary - Pu K. Hmingthanzauva, Edenthar

Treasurer - Pu C. Lalchawiliana, BungkawnFin. Secretary - Pu PC Lalengzauva, Kulikawn

MMA General Assembly vawi 11-naah hian kum 2024 Assembly leh 2026 Assembly inkara member thi mi 39 te sunna hun neih a ni a. Chawhnu lamah Rorelna neih a nih bakah Variety Programme hman niin hetah hian hruaitu chawimawina neih a ni bawk a ni.
